# Unstuck Coach

Unstuck Coach is a non-clinical executive-function accessibility coach by
Kyanite Labs.

## Product

- Landing page: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/
- Live chat: https://unstuck.kyanitelabs.tech/chat/
- Maker: https://kyanitelabs.tech/unstuck/

## What It Does

Unstuck Coach turns a stuck sentence into one humane next move. It is built for
task initiation, reply debt, working-memory overload, admin loops, shutdown, and
re-entry after avoidance.

## What It Is Not

Unstuck Coach is not therapy, diagnosis, or medical treatment. It does not
replace qualified professional support or crisis care.

## Privacy Posture

Product analytics should be coarse and privacy-safe: chat opened, first prompt
submitted, reply received, latency, and error status. Analytics should not store prompts, histories, request bodies, API keys, or provider payloads.
